411BB8E942EF6071F5FE3B9C2A954561: Spawns the Player at any location on their Island
FE059CF140716B098CD13183AA45C682: Spawns the Player at any location on their Island
5AB9208C4F7A35C62116A9A5E9251365: Spawns the Player at any location on their Island.
CB5CA726472B0322E01555A60383E525: Spawns the Player at any location on their Island.
111209DA487D5A7E842E638A162EED8F: Spawns the Player at any location on their island
C70ED883459CAE9B722305814BFCAA97: Spawns the Player at any location on their island

UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Displa: Debug feature to visualize the Enemy Range Check option. The sphere will never show while playing, only during edit mode.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Enable: Determines the game phases during which the device will be enabled.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Priori: Determines the priority order in which spawn pads will be used. Lower is better.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.UseAsI: Determines whether or not a spawn pad can be used when players are spawning in to the island during the Pre-Game phase.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.bRespa: Determines whether or not we respawn players that are alive when the Respawn at Player Spawner is called.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.PlayAu: Determines whether the device should play audio effects.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Visibl: Determines whether the spawn pad is visible during games.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Disabl: Disables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Enable: Enables the device on receiving a signal from the selected channel.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.OnSpaw: Fires when a player tries and fails to spawn on a pad due to the logic calling RespawnPlayer but the pad is ineligible (disabled, another player spawned too recently, too close to enemies if set to). Returns the player that tried to spawn.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.EnemyR: If enemy is within this radius, prefer to not spawn at this location. If no other locations are suitable, player may still spawn here.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.Player: Only players on this class can spawn from this pad.
Only players on this team can spawn from this pad.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.SpawnP: Spawn input player in this spawner. Respawn player if it's already spawn.
UserOptionDefinition.BP_Creative_Player_Spawner_Prop_C.On Pla: Transmits a signal on the selected channel when a player spawns in this plate
